titleEn: AgriFood Signals: Anthropic joins carbon removal coalition, Elanco launches venture arm, AeroFarms acquired
titleZh: AgriFood Signals：Anthropic加入碳去除联盟，Elanco推出风险投资部门，AeroFarms被收购
summaryZh: 本文汇总了2026年6月18日农业食品科技领域的重要融资、并购、合作及政策动态。亮点包括：Anthropic加入碳去除联盟、Elanco成立2500万美元动物健康风险投资部门、AeroFarms被收购并计划扩张、多家初创公司获得融资（如Vertoro、Vivici、Rainbow Crops等），以及欧盟通过新基因组技术法规和植物基肉类标签禁令。内容覆盖精准发酵、基因编辑、土壤健康、碳去除等多个前沿方向。
featuredReason: 本文涵盖动物健康风险投资、精准发酵、基因编辑等与智慧畜牧相关的技术进展，以及欧盟政策变化，为畜牧行业人士提供了技术趋势和资本动向的宏观视角。
contentFull: AgriFood Signals: Anthropic joins carbon removal coalition, Elanco launches venture arm, AeroFarms acquired June 18, 2026 | Jennifer Marston Agtech FoodTech Image credit: Elanco AgFunderNews rounds up the most important fundings, mergers, acquisitions, closures, and industry buzz in agtech and foodtech. Funding news 🇳🇱 Vertoro closes €17 million Series B to scale plant-based waste to renewable oil technology One Stop ESG 🇳🇱 Vivici bags $14.4m EIC funding to scale precision-fermented dairy proteins AgFunderNews 🇺🇸 Rainbow Crops raises $11.25m to scale AI-guided multiplex gene editing AgFunderNews 🇫🇮 Raisio secures €4.5 million research investment to transform grain side streams into next-generation fiber ingredients Protein Production Technology 🇩🇪 Seqana raises €3.2 million to expand soil health measurement beyond carbon iGrow News 🇸🇦 KAUST spinout Terraxy raises $3M to scale desert soil regeneration technology Dealroom 🇨🇦 Picketa Systems raises $1.5m to bring crop nutrient testing to the field AgFunderNews 🇨🇭 OneSoil secures €1M to expand AI-powered farming assistant Tech.eu Image credit: iStock M&A, IPOs & partnerships 🇺🇸 Elanco to launch Elanco Ventures with $25 million multi-year commitment to accelerate innovation in animal health Elanco 🇺🇸 AeroFarms acquired by Palm Ventures affiliate, plans expanded distribution and long-term growth Produce Grower 🇸🇬 A factory for climate startups: 100×100’s US$100M bet on 50 companies in SEA, India e27 🇨🇭 🇮🇳 Syngenta signs MoU to be strategic partner in India’s first open-data agricultural ecosystem Annam.AI ESG Today 🇩🇪 🇬🇧 Döhler commits to cocoa-free future with Nukoko acquisition Confectionary News Rami Jokela, CEO, Solar Foods. Image credit: Elaine Watson Funds, grants & accelerators 🇨🇦 Canada launches $3 billion national food security strategy with $750m dedicated to year-round growing iGrow News 🇺🇸 $915M in new funding to drive carbon removal’s next phase of growth Frontier Climate 🇳🇱 The food system needs a rewiring, not a reinvention, Anterra Capital says after $100m raise AgFunderNews 🇺🇸 CDFA and CDRF announce $34 million available for California dairy projects through the Dairy Plus Program ca.gov 🇫🇮 Solar Foods wins $89.2m backing for ‘protein from air’ factory, but final investment decision still pending AgFunderNews People news 🇺🇸 AgriNovus taps Purdue DIAL Ventures veteran to lead innovation efforts across state’s agbioscience ecosystem AgriNovus 🇺🇸 Mondelēz International names Amit Banati executive vice president and chief financial officer Mondelēz 🇮🇹 Nicolò Barbano joins xFarm Technologies as chief of staff LinkedIn Thijs Bosch, CEO, The Protein Brewery.
